data.value: Move up (lower point of the angle)
StartPoint (BottomBack - TopRight of angled line on Bottom)
Move to Front and Down (BottomLeft of angled line on Bottom)
Move Front and Up (BottomLeft of angled line on Top)

'l ' + (m.mod_CarcaseDepth - m.mod_TopDepth - m.mod_Height + (GlobalFunc.calc_pythagoreanTheorem((270 - m.mod_SlopeAngle) / 2, 0, m.mod_Height, 0)[1])) + ',' + (m.mod_CarcaseHeight - m.mod_BackHeight - m.mod_Height + (GlobalFunc.calc_pythagoreanTheorem(m.mod_SlopeAngle / 2, 0, m.mod_Height, 0)[1]))
Move back and Up (TopRight of angled line on Top)
Move down and back (to the vertice)
